name: Zucchini Lemon Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, slice and boil the zucchini in water to cover until tender.
2. Drain; cool.
3. Mash or puree the zucchini until smooth.
4. Place the mashed zucchini in a large saucepan.
5. Add butter, sugar, lemon juice, and lemon rind to the saucepan.
6. Bring the mixture to a full boil, stirring frequently.
7. Add Certo; continue boiling for 2 minutes.
8. Skim off any foam that forms during boiling.
9. Pack the hot mixture into sterilized jars.
10. Seal the jars tightly.
11. Store in the refrigerator for short-term use or in the freezer for long-term storage.
